name: Fang
description:
edgy sadistic protogen-esque creature. edgy name to go along. no, he does not have any visible fangs. yes, it's questionable character design to name him that. i don't know, just pretend he has a cool fang on his visor or something.

lore inaccurate, I don't even know what a protogen is. bite me.
